title: MT Hospital | Kuzhikattussery, Thrissur
description: This hospital blessed Maria Theresa's vision and her sincere mission with spirit of God was the only force behind this humble project.
text: MT Hospital | Kuzhikattussery, Thrissur MT Hospital, Thrissur, Kerala, India. Qualified Doctors There are some great doctors who offer years of experience and treatment to ensure you get the best care. Academics Our School of Nursing is a focused school of higher education committed to educating women for nursing careers. Supportive Services We offer support in obtaining info about a patient's health to support diagnosis, treatment and disease prevention. About Hospital Welcome to MT Hospital Maria Theresa Hospital was established as a movement of our beloved Foundress, Saint Mariam Thresia, to continue her healing mission with merciful love and care. The hospital comprises many departments and facilities, providing efficient medical care and gaining popularity over the past 47 years. We are accredited with NABH Entry-Level Accreditation and consistently prioritize patient safety as our primary concern. Our hospital is a not-for-profit organization registered as a charitable trust. It is a 200-bedded multi-speciality hospital, fully equipped with operation theatres (OT), a post-surgical ICU, a medical ICU, and a NICU with ventilator support. We also provide training in various nursing courses. MEDICINE) View Profile Dr. Ranjit K.R MBBS, MD (GEN MEDICINE), DNB, CCEBDM View Profile Dr. Rajesh S MBBS, D.ORTHO, DNB (ORTHOPEDICS) View Profile Dr. Finto Francis MBBS, DNB (OBG) View Profile Don’t hesitate, contact us for better help and services Explore all Dr. Team Testimonial what Patients Say ? We went for an emergency to my 2 years old daughter.  The care towards the emergency is really made us feel that we are in our native place as we are from Tamilnadu. Doctors, nurses and the staff service and care made us more comfortable. Thank you Dr. Sinta Mary Jose and Maria Theresa hospital. RAMYA PURUSHOTHAMAN Department: Casualty & Paediatrics The best place to recommend. Dr. Finto and all the other staff and departments we have visited have given us excellent service at the most economical price, Dr. Finto and his team's services and confidence are exceptional, and from my personal experience as a nurse in other countries, it’s the best you can find around the world. The level of support and flexibility they give in the care is praiseworthy. ANN JOSEPH Department: Gynaecology I consulted Dr. John Mathew for the gaps in my tooth. It was a great experience that I could remove my braces just after 8 months with a great change in my tooth. I was very comfortable and also convinced with their service. ALVIYA SHIJU Department: Dental ഒരിക്കലും ഒരു Hospital ആണെന്ന് തോന്നിയിട്ടില്ല.. Truly homely atmosphere. Doctors and Staffs are very friendly. Especially our own Finto Francis, Gynaecologist and Dr. Sr Agnes Jose. Each and every doctors and staffs at this hospital is so nice behaviour. DILEEP DHARMAN Department: Gynaecology & Neonatology Very good experience and staff. I had the delivery of my baby boy in this hospital. Was quite satisfied by doctor Sinsila and the hospital staff work. ARUN NAIR Department: Gynaecology It’s a very good hospital especially the ENT Doctor Paul. He is a very good surgeon and he is taking care of his patients in a very good manner. VINAY S CHANDRAN Department: ENT The best surgical care I have ever experienced! Dr. Vikraman & his Staff are very professional, courteous, and friendly. Thank you so much. BEENA MATHEW Department: General Surgery The doctors in orthopaedics department are very good. The dressing room staffs are taking care of each patient very carefully. RAJEEV V S Department: Orthopaedics The best centre for physicians. Dr. Sreedharan and Dr. Renjith are very good doctors with lots of experience. I recommend appointing a lady physician too. ANTONY ABRAHAM Department: General Medicine Feel free to Contact Us Submit OUR BLOG Recent Articles and News Jan 17, 2024 We are Hiring!
